title: Compliance Officer
description:
Compliance Officer

About The Company

Sing Investments & Finance Limited has more 60 years of lending experience in the financing arena in Singapore. Our core activities include the acceptance of fixed and saving deposits from the public as well as the provision of loans and credit facilities to individuals and corporations, particularly the Small and Medium Enterprises (SMEs) in Singapore. The relationships that have been built over the years have earned us the reputation as one of Singapore's trusted finance companies. We are seeking dynamic individuals to grow with us and to continue building relationships with our valued customers.

We are looking for an experienced AML officer to join the AML team to support the company’s client on-boarding and ongoing monitoring activities and to ensure alignment with the company’s standards, policies and procedures and regulatory requirements.

Responsibilities:

Key Responsibilities

1. Client Onboarding & Monitoring

  • Assist with timely client onboarding and ongoing reviews, incorporating data-driven risk profiling.
  • Validate Source of Wealth and Source of Funds documentation for high-risk clients.

2. Advisory & Support

  • Provide guidance to the first line of defence on documentation requirements for individual and non-individual clients.
  • Advise on AML/CFT-related matters and red flags identified by staff.

3. Transaction Monitoring, Name Screening and Customer Risk Reviews

  • Ensure timely monitoring, investigation, and disposal of alerts generated by automated transaction monitoring (TM) and name screening systems.
  • Conduct annual and ad hoc reviews of TM alert scenarios, thresholds, and parameters using statistical and predictive analytics.
  • Liaise with internal teams on investigations and provide advisory on alerts flagged.
  • Perform AML/CFT/PF customer risk review.

4. Data Analytics & Reporting

  • Utilize data visualization tool to analyse large datasets, detect suspicious patterns, and optimize alert scenarios.
  • Prepare periodic management reports with trend analysis and actionable insights.

5. System & Process Enhancement

  • Manage TM, name screening and customer risk assessment system enhancements, including UAT and fine-tuning of alert parameters.
  • Support automation initiatives to streamline AML/CFT/PF processes.

6. Compliance & Regulatory

  • Report, investigate, document, and file STRs on suspicious transactions.
  • Conduct gap analysis on MAS Notices, Guidelines, and Circulars impacting AML/CFT/PF processes.
  • Handle queries from MAS, auditors, and other external parties.

7. Quality Assurance & Training

8. Perform sample checks on alert disposal quality and recommend improvements.

9.  Provide training and guidance to junior compliance officers on alert handling and analytics best practices.

10. Assume as covering officer for AML\CFT\PF Team Lead/Supervisor when required.

11. Policy & Governance

  • Stay updated on emerging typologies and incorporate updates into AML/CFT/PF policies and procedures.
  • Conduct annual and ad hoc reviews of AML/CFT/PF policies and procedures.

Requirements:

  • A recognized university degree, tertiary education or relevant professional qualification in financial service.
  • 4-6 years’ experience working in a similar capacity.
  • Preferred certifications: CAMS, ICA, or equivalent.
  • Solid understanding of applicable Anti-Money Laundering, Counter Terrorist Financing and Proliferation Financing Laws, Rules and Regulations.
  • Experience in Source of Wealth assessment and documentation standards.
  • Strong proficiency in data analytics and visualization tools (Power BI).
  • Analytical mindset with ability to interpret complex data and present actionable insights.
  • Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.
  • Attention to details and have an investigative, inquisitive and questioning nature.
  • Team player, proactive and able to work well independently.

Only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Remuneration and corporate rank will commensurate with experience.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
